rounds_summary.attempted_route: nk.eda_process + direct column access eda_signals['EDA_SCR_Peaks'] for SCR peak indices; Photosensor midpoint threshold for event onsets; generic Condition_N labels.
rounds_summary.observation: KeyError: 'EDA_SCR_Peaks' — column does not exist in the installed NeuroKit2 version; script crashed before producing any output.

rounds_summary.attempted_route: Replaced EDA_SCR_Peaks lookup with nk.eda_findpeaks() on phasic component; same midpoint Photosensor binarization; generic Condition_N labels; manual epoch windowing.
rounds_summary.observation: Ran successfully (exit 0, 4 rows), but scored 8/16. Generic 'Condition_1..4' labels mismatched reference condition identifiers encoded in the Photosensor signal levels.

rounds_summary.attempted_route: Photosensor mode-based baseline detection to read condition labels from signal level; nk.epochs_create + nk.bio_analyze(method='event-related') for standardized output columns.
rounds_summary.observation: KeyError: 'RSA_P2T' inside nk.bio_analyze._bio_analyze_rsa_event — RSA computation crashes when RSA_P2T column is absent from the combined epoch DataFrame.

ruled_out_routes: eda_signals['EDA_SCR_Peaks'] column access after nk.eda_process — column does not exist in this NeuroKit2 version.
nk.bio_analyze(epochs, method='event-related') with combined ECG+EDA+RSP epochs — crashes internally on missing RSA_P2T column regardless of input.
Photosensor midpoint-threshold binarization with generic Condition_N labels — produces wrong condition identifiers, causing row-level eval mismatches even when numeric values are correct.
synthesised_diagnosis: Across all three rounds, the agent was blocked by a compounding pair of NeuroKit2 API surface mismatches and an under-specified condition-label convention. Round 1 assumed a non-existent column name; round 2 fixed that but ignored that condition identity is encoded in Photosensor amplitude levels, not position; round 3 addressed both but triggered a separate internal crash in nk.bio_analyze's RSA sub-routine. No single tactical patch could fix all three simultaneously because the task requires correct column APIs, correct label extraction, AND avoiding the bio_analyze RSA path.
rationale: Each round failed on a different NeuroKit2 API surface detail (wrong column name, wrong label source, broken internal sub-routine), not on the biosignal processing logic itself. The task is solvable but requires knowing exactly which API paths are stable in the installed version.
recommended_alternative: Use nk.eda_findpeaks() for SCR peaks (proven working in round 2). Extract condition labels by reading the unique non-baseline Photosensor values at each rising edge (photosensor[onset_index] as the label string). Compute ECG_Rate_Mean, RSP_Rate_Mean, and EDA_Peak_Amplitude with manual epoch windowing (avoid nk.bio_analyze entirely to bypass the RSA_P2T crash). This bundles all three fixes without using any ruled-out route.
